description: You move further into the corridor, but the half-asleep prison guard wakes before you can get by him. He stumbles up, grabs his weapon, and blocks the only clear path forward.
After leaving the guard table behind, you hear claws scraping over stone. A rat far too large for any normal cellar drops from the dark and comes straight at you.
You choose the stairway, but you do not get far. On the landing above, a castle warden steps from the shadows with his blade already drawn. The stairs are too narrow to get around him cleanly.

The sealed passage opens, and the chamber beyond looks empty for half a second. Then bones scrape against stone and an old guard skeleton pulls itself upright, still ready to defend the route it guarded in life.
You take the side hall, expecting a quieter route, but the castle has posted something worse there. A shadow assassin steps from an alcove and cuts off the corridor without a word.
choice_2: Use your items and look for an opening

description: You enter the grand hall and realise too late that the movement you saw was hunting you. A shadow hound lowers its head and charges across the broken floor before you can turn back.
You choose the armory route, but it is not abandoned. A guardian in full plate turns from the weapon rack, lifts a war hammer, and squares itself between you and the far exit.
choice_2: Retreat before he cuts off the exit

description: You step into the treasure room and trigger its defence immediately. Something heavy drops from above and lands between you and the chamber, mace in hand. Ravenspire does not leave treasure unguarded.

You rush the final corridor, and that is exactly what the castle wanted. Three soldiers step out together from the shadows ahead. The ambush was prepared for anyone desperate enough to run for the gate.
choice_2: Use your items and find an opening
